_comment: Refined preview for Task 2D.11 (axisymmetric A_phi). Same FH-anchor pin as fell_heisenberg_vortical_preview.json, but V_A scanned tightly in the perturbative regime [0, 0.2] (5 values) to isolate small-vorticity effects from the non-perturbative regime probed by the original preview (where N_vortical_max reached ~9). Headline question: does perturbative axisymmetric vorticity move dec_slack_min in the favourable direction (toward zero from below) at the canonical anchor where the irrotational baseline misses strict-pass by ~4 cells? 5x3x3x3 = 135 vortical points at the fixed FH anchor.
